div.head: The Minister in Nicaragua (Lane) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 74. As we are now in accord on all points, Nicaraguan negotiators (Francisco Castro and Federico Sacasa) have just informed me that agreement can be signed Wednesday afternoon March 11th. Minister for Foreign Affairs was not present at tonight’s session, hence I am unable now to specify hour of signature. He will sign for Nicaragua as Leonardo Argüello. My exact signature is Arthur Bliss Lane.
Shall telegraph as soon as possible proposed hour of signature.
I hope that the Department notwithstanding the foregoing will answer affirmatively my 66, March 9, noon.
